generated_from.note: dashboard trade log is a rolling window, not full history

promotion_to_live_requires: calibration breaker quiet for >=20 consecutive settled paper trades AND realized paper ROI > 0 over that span

HAWKEYE_H2.reason: insufficient evidence to disable; paper-only until promotion criterion met

HAWKEYE_LOW_V0.reason: adverse selection: positive outcomes >2 sigma below market-implied expectation with negative net P&L

execution.reason: manual exits are frequent and net-negative in window — hold to settlement

sizing.rationale: per-contract fee ceil rounding <=0.6pp of stake at C>=5
